name: research-assistant
description: Academic Research Assistant v5.0 — 8-phase pipeline with PaperOrchestra-style 5-agent drafting. Context-anchored theory discovery + post-hoc template calibration. CS/STEM + social sciences + humanities.

plugins.name: research-assistant
plugins.description: 8-phase iterative loop: problem anchoring → literature search → empirical design → data/figures → PaperOrchestra drafting → peer review + template calibration → routed revision → final formatting. Skips empirical phases for theory papers. CS + social science dual domain support.
